words.def: a characteristic (habitual or relatively temporary) state of feeling
words.zh: n. 幽默, 詼諧, 情緒, 體液

words.def: a message whose ingenuity or verbal skill or incongruity has the power to evoke laughter
words.zh: n. 幽默, 詼諧, 心情

words.def: a period of time equal to 1/24th of a day
words.zh: n. 小時, 鐘頭, 時間, ...點鐘, 課時

words.def: the state of being or appearing to be actively engaged in an activity
words.zh: n. 嗡嗡聲, 哼聲, 雜聲

words.def: (computer science) memory whose contents can be accessed and read but cannot be changed
